posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.content:
Predictions: 4 of 6 Pending
|
Tied for 1st with 64 others

Murilo vs. Laurenço
Alisson Murilo, TKO, R1
Murillo is a sick prospect. He doesn’t have any signature wins but he’s finished most of his opponents and brings that super violent chute boxe style we’re all familiar with. I thought he beat Degli but regardless he put up an extremely good fight. I think he should easily ko ben 10, he was once a good prospect but he’s been getting finished in every fight now. Murillo to dwcs with a win

Silva vs. Morais
Zion Silva, TKO, R2
Silva is a cool prospect from fighting nerds. He’s older but has been fighting a lot which is good. Maybe he can get on dwcs with a win or two.
